Core_Phenotypic_Effect.reason: Results show embryo arrest at elongated zygote/1-cell stage with severe endosperm defects.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: All three summary points match the Results and Discussion.

Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step.reason: The statement only claims essentiality, not rate-limitation, which the paper supports.

Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.reason: Phenotypes were observed in normal seed development.

Potential_Tradeoffs.reason: The paper reports embryo lethality and reduced transmission of the mutant allele.

Other_Important_Info.reason: The paper explicitly contrasts UMPS/pyrimidine synthesis with purine and cytokinin pathways to support the nucleic-acid interpretation.

Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu.reason: The paper does not discuss breeding or engineering applications.

corrections.reason: No EC numbers are provided in the paper.

corrections.old_value: Not suitable for loss-of-function engineering due to lethality
corrections.reason: The paper does not discuss breeding or engineering applications.
